title: Bulk RNAseq Extraction Protocol
author: Kimberly Paquette
materials: Qiagen RNeasy Lipid Tissue Mini kit
Qubit RNA Broad Range assay kit

steps.title: Manually cut 40-50mg of frozen brain tissue on dry ice
steps.instruction: Manually cut 40-50mg of frozen brain tissue on dry ice. Weigh and place back in -80 °C freezer until ready for extraction. Note: do not let tissue thaw. Keep frozen at all times.

steps.title: Using the Qiagen RNeasy Lipid Tissue...
steps.instruction: Using the Qiagen RNeasy Lipid Tissue Mini kit, prepare reagents and materials for extraction in a chemical hood. Note: use an RNase free environment and clean with RNase Zap.

steps.title: Follow extraction steps outlined in Qiagen...
steps.instruction: Follow extraction steps outlined in Qiagen RNeasy Lipid Tissue Mini kit using the Tissue Ruptor II to homogenize frozen brain tissue.

steps.title: Using the Qubit RNA Broad Range...
steps.instruction: Using the Qubit RNA Broad Range assay kit, measure the concentration of extracted RNA using 2 µL of sample.

steps.title: Aliquot desired amount of sample to...
steps.instruction: Aliquot desired amount of sample to continue with for sequencing ( >500 ng ) .

steps.title: Snap freeze each RNA sample with...
steps.instruction: Snap freeze each RNA sample with liquid nitrogen and store in -80 °C freezer indefinitely.

steps.title: Optional
steps.instruction: Optional: sequence with Illumina's TruSeq stranded riboreduced total RNA at the recommended 50M reads/sample.

steps.title: Include on column DNase digestion step. Note
steps.instruction: Include on column DNase digestion step. Note: keep extracted RNA on wet ice.
